94 I1V I1V_HEMIPLEGIA 25d(I1v)Hemiplegia/Hemiparesis CHAR 1 Indicates a diagnosis of hemiplegia/hemiparesis - paralysis/partial paralysis (temporary or permanent impariment of sensation, function, motion) of both limbs on one side of the body - usually caused by cerebral hemorrhage, thrombosis, embolism, or tumor. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 =
